holdings.n: BLK CSH FND TREASURY SL AGENCY

holdings.infoBox: IXG is an equity ETF with a total of 254 individual holdings. The top holdings are Berkshire Hathaway stock at 5.93%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 5.92%, Visa Inc. at 3.66%, Mastercard at 2.64%, and Bank of America at 2.47%.

overview.description: The iShares Global Financials ETF (IXG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of large- and mid-cap global financial stocks. IXG was launched on Nov 12, 2001 and is issued by BlackRock.
